type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: SRU operated for all of 2015.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a greater than 10% increase in emissions of NOx compared to the previous year due to the commissioning of Phase 2B in mid-2013. A second cogeneration unit, including both a gas turbine (GTG) and heat recovery steam generator (HRSG), was installed in mid-2013 though it was not fully operational until October of the same year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a greater than 10% increase in emissions of NOx compared to the previous year due to the commissioning of Phase 2B in mid-2013. A second cogeneration unit, including both a gas turbine (GTG) and heat recovery steam generator (HRSG), was installed in mid-2013 though it was not fully operational until October of the same year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a decrease from 2012 emissions as low NOx natural gas emissions factors were used for 2013 CO calculations because both gas turbines utilized low NOx burners.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a greater than 10% increase in emissions of SO2 compared to the previous year due to the commissioning of Phase 2B in mid-2013. A second cogeneration unit, including both a gas turbine (GTG) and heat recovery steam generator (HRSG), was installed in mid-2013 though it was not fully operational until October of the same year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Overall reduced sulphur content in mixed fuel gas feeding Heat Recovery Steam Generator (HRSG).

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The increase in SO2 emissions is due to 1. annual production increase and 2. Implementation of a process optimization strategy that  allows higher H2S concentration gas to be combusted while still achieving the overall sulphur recovery target. MEG operated within it's daily SO2 limits for all for 2018.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The cogen unit was reported as a separate entity this year. Subsequently, emissions attributed to the cogen unit were excluded from the main facility. Cogeneration emissions were included in the main facility reporting for previous reporting years.
